title: Canadian Poutine Stuffed Turkey Breast
description: A twist on the classic poutine, this recipe stuffs a turkey breast with the flavors of poutine and fries.
instructions: Season the turkey breast with salt and pepper.
In a pan, cook the Canadian bacon until crispy.
Stuff the turkey breast with the poutine gravy, Canadian bacon, and shredded cheese curds.
Close the turkey breast and secure with kitchen twine.
Place the turkey in a roasting pan and bake for 45-50 minutes or until cooked through.
While the turkey is cooking, cook the fries in the oven until crispy.
Slice the turkey and serve with poutine gravy and crispy fries.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
